Action: Business Issuer creates a non-deferred credential offer for unbound SD-JWT
Data:
- Credential type: unbound_example_sd_jwt
- Deferred: false (immediate issuance)
Expected Result: Issuer returns HTTP 200 with CredentialWithDeeplinkResponse and management_id

Action: Business Issuer retrieves credential offer status by management ID
Data:
- Management ID from offer
- GET request to /management/api/status/{id}

Action: Verify status response contains valid credential status information
Expected Result: Status field is not null; status value reflects the current offer state
